scope: FDQ-01 CTO autonomous smoke + Resend domain pre-provisioning

task_a_inbox_verify.method: Resend API GET /emails/{id} bypass (no Gmail access)
task_a_inbox_verify.subject: FLUXION — Hai già attivato la tua licenza?
task_a_inbox_verify.caveat: folder placement (inbox/spam/promozioni) NOT visible via Resend API — founder verify residual non-blocking

method_2_trigger_fresh_event.resend_error: You can only send testing emails to your own email address (fluxion.gestionale@gmail.com). To send emails to other recipients, please verify a domain at resend.com/domains, and change the from address to an email using this domain.

critical_finding.description: S306 fix (Brevo→Resend swap) uses onboarding@resend.dev shared sender. Resend test-mode restriction: shared sender can only deliver to account-owner verified email. Production E2E with customer.email != fluxion.gestionale@gmail.com → 403 validation_error → license email NEVER delivered → customer cannot activate.
validation_sources: Resend API empirical 403 (fresh Stripe trigger test)
Resend docs (Managing Domains) — 'sending from default addresses only suitable for initial testing'
Automation Atlas May 2026 — 'free tier requires 1 verified domain for production'
critical_finding.structural_critique_S306_retroactive: Tandem research S306 + WebSearch May 2026 confirmed Resend 100/day free tier MA assumption nascosta 'shared sender works for all recipients' → FALSE. Bias confirmation: verified only owner→owner delivery (S306 admin/email-sequence/preview), generalized to all recipients without E2E test with non-owner to-address.

founder_actions_required: 1. Cloudflare Registrar: register fluxion-app.com (~$10.46/year, individual OK, NO VAT P.IVA required)
2. Cloudflare DNS panel: add 3 records output Resend domain creation (vedi cf_dns_records.txt)
4. Resend dashboard or API: trigger domain verification
cto_autonomous_post_founder: 7. Re-smoke: stripe trigger checkout.session.completed (no metadata override) → expect Resend 200 send
8. Promote to prod env when verified

regola_4_critica_strutturale_S307.assunzione_nascosta: Resend shared sender onboarding@resend.dev assumed working for all recipients — empirically FALSE
regola_4_critica_strutturale_S307.rompe_a_X_giorni: Day 1 production launch: prima vendita reale → cliente non riceve email license → support storm + refund risk
regola_4_critica_strutturale_S307.pattern_errore_noto: Resend dev/test sandbox restriction = classic post-mortem nei SaaS, ignored in tandem research S306
regola_4_critica_strutturale_S307.sovradimensione: NO — undersized: avrei dovuto smoke con to=different-from-owner@example.com in S306

regola_22_critique_then_ignore_candidata: S296 Brevo critique → S303 deploy ignored → S305 paid (Brevo sender fail) → S306 swap Brevo→Resend → S307 paid (Resend shared sender restriction). Pattern conferma: ogni decisione email provider necessita E2E smoke con destinatari diversi PRE production claim. NEW critique-action-gate proposed: PLAN.md flagged critique MUST have [ADDRESSED|DEFERRED:reason] PRE-deploy.
